# Madhulata Solutions AI Platform

## Features

- AI Company Website
- FastAPI Backend
- LangChain RAG Chatbot
- PostgreSQL Database
- Chroma Vector Store
- n8n Workflow Automation
- Admin Dashboard
- Contact Form Automation

Backend
